text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the Satsuki Sho, Biwa Hayahide is
excited to compete with fierce racers like
Winning Ticket and Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Narita Taishin wrestles with the
annoyance of constantly being dismissed due to
her small stature.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before the race, Biwa Hayahide notices that
Narita Taishin seems off and tries to reach out to
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, the look in Narita Taishin's eyes
indicates that she is in no mood to talk. She
leaves without saying a word.
